text:
Greetings,

this PR is approved, with my thanks to Florian for the trials and PR.

(I think I asked that the BROKEN be removed in an earlier PR and it was  
postponed due to missing pointyhat builds, but I'd have to check the  
actual records to be sure, if that still matters to anyone given we have a  
success report.)

Best regards

-- 
Matthias Andree
